title: Canonical registry
description: Target contract for the canonical registry (.agents/registry.yaml). DEFINITION ONLY — not enforced in PR B; .agents/registry.yaml is NOT edited by this PR. Runtime registries are target-generated-only later (PR D/F).

agents.description: Active agent entries. See agent-profile.schema.json for per-agent profile contract.

skills.description: Skill ids (or {id} objects) available in the canonical layer.

archived_avatarless_agents.description: Agents archived out of the persona layer. See archive-entry.schema.json.

runtime_adapters.description: Adapter ids (see runtime-adapter.schema.json). May appear as 'model_adapters' in legacy data.

model_adapters.description: Legacy alias for runtime_adapters (present in current .agents/registry.yaml).

source_prompt_references.description: References to docs/agents/sources/** (capabilities/runtimes/orchestrators). Reference material — NOT active runtime, NOT active agents, NOT executable skills.

$comment: Registry landscape (4 registries, 3 schemas): .agents/registry.yaml = CANONICAL target (not edited in PR B); .vscode/.codex/agents/registry.yaml = ACTIVE runtime, generation target later (NEVER touched in PR B); registry.yaml (root) = legacy pointer-manifest, deprecate-candidate (not deleted); .vscode/.codex/registry.yaml = empty scaffold, deprecate-candidate (not deleted). Reconciliation 4->1 and runtime generation are OPEN — see docs/architecture/registry-reconciliation.md.
